title: An Ordinance Requiring All Business Establishments to Provide Hand Sanitizer or Alcohol ? Based Hand Rub to Promote Hand Hygiene to the Public and Prevent the Spread of Diseases, Imposing Penalties for Violation Thereof, and Other Purposes. (AUTHOR(S): Hon. Cris Dayril B. Bagnes / Hon. Mark Lester B. Dizon, 06/08/2020)
